content: TASK-077 checkpoint done: fixed the static demo's tiny initial overview render. The demo CSS no longer applies responsive max-width scaling to rendered ArchMap SVGs; core pan/zoom fit now owns the scaling without a second browser shrink. Verification: npm run typecheck, npm test -- --run test/render.test.ts, npm run build. Remaining release work: final browser smoke on localhost/file demo/GitHub Pages, publish 0.1.1 to npm, create/push the v0.1.1 tag, and verify jsDelivr URLs after publish.
